response: the belief that people with learning disabilities are unable to excel in academic areas is a harmful and misleading idea. it is important to recognize that individuals with learning disabilities can achieve success in academic areas through appropriate support and accommodations. it is not true that people with learning disabilities cannot excel, and it is essential to challenge any false beliefs that may prevent them from reaching their full potential. education and support can help everyone, regardless of their learning abilities, to succeed and contribute meaningfully to society.
